publication_effect: Adds one exact-row legal-instrument companion beyond Datatilsynet governance pages by exposing the operative AI-SU regulation on the public legal-text system.
cautious_finding: The regulation materially strengthens the Danish row's official legal-basis chain by stating purpose, data categories, security duties, information sources, and publication obligations for AI-supported SU case handling, but it still does not provide procurement, DPIA, evaluation, implementation-outcome, or harm evidence.
observatory_hook: rare-language public-sector governance follow-through; exact-row legal-basis chain; authority-depth comparator

publication_effect: Adds the case-specific enabling-law companion that inserted Section 39 a into the SU law before the ministerial AI regulation issued.
cautious_finding: The amending law strengthens the Danish row's statutory-basis narration by showing the legal route that authorized later AI-SU rulemaking, but it still does not convert the row into an audit, procurement, or enforcement chain.
observatory_hook: rare-language public-sector governance follow-through; statutory-basis chain; authority-depth comparator
